name: Nuke Channel
description: Delete a channel and recreate the same channel again.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.successMessage: Channel nuked by {mention}. This is the new {channelMention}.
defaults.confirmMessage: This will delete the whole channel and recreate it. Run `{command} {confirmationKeyword}` to confirm.
defaults.permissionMessage: You and I both need Manage Channels permission to nuke this channel.
defaults.unsupportedMessage: This channel type cannot be nuked.
